title: Fix coverage changed-files gate false failures in CI
description: Scope changed-files coverage gate to production source files and align it with coverage omit/collection behavior; improve CI logging so failure payload is visible.
creator: derek.norrbom

comments.author: derek.norrbom
comments.text: Implemented source-scoped changed-files coverage gate and Python omit-awareness. Verified against CI run 23355872293 artifacts + refs (origin/main...581dd789a6258ed543fc78340a6dd65ecfb2c0c6): gate now passes with failed_files=0 and agents_management.py marked skipped due to python/.coveragerc omit. Updated CI workflow to pipe gate JSON through tee for visible failure payloads.
